# UART stress test vectors for chuanzhitiao DP firmware
# Protocol: send raw bytes [m][n][m*n grid bytes].
# Expected response: 4 bytes, big-endian signed int.
# Grid generator: g[i][j] = (i*17 + j*31 + 7) % 10, with g[0][0]=g[m-1][n-1]=0.
# Copy the PAYLOAD_HEX line into a serial tool hex-send box; compare board reply with EXPECT_RECV_HEX.

## Case 1: regression_12x10
SIZE=12x10
DMEM_WORDS_USED=410
EXPECT_DEC=244
EXPECT_RECV_HEX=000000F4
PAYLOAD_HEX=0C0A000809000102030405060405060708090001020301020304050607080900080900010203040506070506070809000102030402030405060708090001090001020304050607080607080900010203040503040506070809000102000102030405060708090708090001020304050604050607080900010200

PAYLOAD_
